headline: Quest Diagnostics Receives New York State Approval for Haystack MRD®, Broadening Patient Access to ctDNA Minimal Residual Disease Testing
summary: Quest Diagnostics® (NYSE: DGX), a leading provider of diagnostic information services, today announced that the New York State Department of Health's (NYSDOH) Clinical Laboratory Evaluation Program (CLEP) has approved the company's Haystack MRD® test, a circulating tumor DNA (ctDNA) liquid biopsy test, for use in identifying residual or recurring disease in patients with a range of solid tumor cancers.
